name: INNOVATIVE FOOD HOLDINGS INC
summary: Innovative Food Holdings, Inc. (IVFH) distributes specialty and perishable food products including origin-specific seafood, domestic and imported meats, exotic game, artisanal cheeses, caviar, mushrooms, micro-greens, and organic ingredients. The company serves Professional Chefs at restaurants, hotels, casinos, hospitals, and national chains via direct delivery, e-commerce on Amazon and its own website, and drop-ship through broadline distributors like US Foods. Operations are supported by warehouses in Chicago and Denver.

products.name: Specialty Seafood
products.description: Origin-specific seafood including Alaskan wild king salmon and Gulf of Mexico day-boat snapper distributed to Professional Chefs.

products.name: Specialty Meats and Poultry
products.description: Exotic game, domestic and imported meats, free-range and organic poultry including buffalo tenderloin and kurobuta pork.

products.name: Artisanal Cheeses
products.description: Domestic and imported artisan cheeses sourced and distributed to Professional Chefs nationally.

products.name: Specialty Produce and Ingredients
products.description: Micro-greens, mushrooms, white asparagus, truffle oils, fennel pollen, estate-bottled olive oils, and aged vinegars.

products.name: Organic Bulk Ingredients
products.description: Wholesale bulk organic ingredients and related food products, operated through Golden Organics subsidiary.

products.name: Company-owned branded products
products.description: Products sourced, packaged, and branded by IVFH to control assortment and capture additional margin.

partnerships.description: IVFH drop ships specialty foods to Professional Chefs nationally through US Foods' broadline distributor websites.
IVFH sells specialty foods to customers via its e-commerce presence on Amazon.com.
Transition Services Agreement for inventory and fulfillment services for 30 days post-sale of igourmet assets.
